creator: kaz@kobe1995.net
text:
In article <200205291548.AAA19521@ns.kobe1995.net>
kaz@kobe1995.net writes:
>>does this problem still exists in a recent FreeBSD 4-STABLE system?
>
>I will try with 4.6R in near feature.

I've tryed with 4.6-PRERELEASE. It works fine, but only "-t fixate"
returns -1.

AthlonXP/1.33GHz*2
TYAN TigerMP(AMD760MP)

% uname -a
FreeBSD milk.kobe1995.net 4.6-PRERELEASE-20020504-JPSNAP FreeBSD 4.6-PRERELEASE-20020504-JPSNAP #0: Sun May 19 18:19:23 JST 2002     kaz@milk.kobe1995.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/KOBE4SMP  i386
% dmesg
...
acd0: CD-RW <_NEC NR-7500A> at ata0-master PIO4
...
# time burncd -t -s 99 data Vine25-i386.iso fixate && time burncd -s 8 data Vine25-i386.iso fixate
next writeable LBA 0
writing from file Vine25-i386.iso size 612738 KB
written this track 612738 KB (100%) total 612738 KB
fixating CD, please wait..
burncd: ioctl(CDRIOCFIXATE): Input/output error
0.161u 6.399s 9:02.50 1.2%      14+168k 4806+0io 1pf+0w
milk# burncd -s 8 data Vine25-i386.iso fixate
... (It works fine)

Thank you.
